scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 execute fingerprint-db --file=migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute fingerprint-db --file=migrations/0002_tg_user.sql && wrangler d1 execute fingerprint-db --file=migrations/0003_relay.sql
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute fingerprint-db --local --file=migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute fingerprint-db --local --file=migrations/0002_tg_user.sql && wrangler d1 execute fingerprint-db --local --file=migrations/0003_relay.sql
